title: Safety communications concerning medicines, medical devices and other healthcare products
body: "Medicines and medical devices available to UK patients must reach high standards of safety, quality and efficacy. However, no medical product is completely free of risk. The MHRA continually monitors the safety of products, balancing their benefits and risks and communicating transparently when we identify a new safety issue. Patient safety is our highest priority, and we do not hesitate to take action to protect the public, including by promptly issuing new advice to minimise these risks or remove products from use. "
